name: PT Mitra Pinasthika Mustika Tbk
summary: PT Mitra Pinasthika Mustika Tbk, through its subsidiaries, engages in the distribution of two-wheel vehicle and spare parts under Honda brand primarily in Indonesia. It operates through three segments: Distribution, Retail and Aftermarket; Transportation; and Others. The company operates MPMMotor retail outlets. It is also involved in the four-wheel vehicle retail sale and rental, general insurance, and financing activities, as well as online sale of four wheels-vehicle and its supporting activities. In addition, the company provides investment, management consulting, and advisory services; auction services; outsourcing services; land, sea, and air freight forwarding; and other, trading, and workshop services. Further, it trades in new and used motor vehicles, and supporting components; offers general and motor vehicle trading and agency services; and computer consultant activities and other computer facility management services. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia.
